topic: AI HQ Product Launch — Full Competitive Intelligence & Research Sprint

our_differentiators: Visual office floor UI (no competitor has this)
Stripe-integrated monetisation out of the box

OpenClaw.pricing: Free and open-source (users pay LLM API costs only)
features: 250,000+ GitHub stars — most starred non-aggregator project
Executes real-world tasks: email, calendar, terminal, code deploy
limitations: China banned state agencies from using it
Creator left for OpenAI (Feb 2026) — governance uncertain
OpenClaw.threat_level: HIGH — massive adoption but security/governance risks create opening

limitations: High API costs for complex tasks
No billing, no persistent personalities, no live dashboard
AutoGPT.threat_level: MEDIUM — big name but stalling vs OpenClaw

pricing.enterprise: Custom — up to 30,000 executions, unlimited seats, SOC2, SSO, RBAC

features: CrewAI Studio: no-code visual editor + AI copilot
Dozens of integrations (Gmail, Slack, HubSpot, Salesforce, Notion, GitHub)
limitations: Key features locked behind paid plans
Execution-based pricing gets expensive at scale
No visual office/spatial UI, no persistent personalities
CrewAI.threat_level: HIGH — closest feature competitor, but web-only and execution-capped

limitations: No visual management UI for non-devs
LangGraph.threat_level: LOW — developer tool, not competing for same buyer

features: Full software company simulation (PM, architect, engineer)
Natural language to full project output
limitations: No dashboard, no desktop app, no persistent personalities
MetaGPT.threat_level: LOW — different use case (dev tool vs operations platform)

1_competitive_analysis.competitive_gap_summary: No competitor offers visual office-floor UI + persistent agent personalities + Mac-native + Stripe billing. OpenClaw is biggest threat by adoption but has security/governance issues. CrewAI is closest on features but web-only and execution-capped. Our flat-tier pricing avoids credit anxiety that plagues Lindy, Manus, and Relevance.
1_competitive_analysis.pricing_position: Solo $49 sits between Manus Plus ($39) and Lindy Pro ($50). Team $149 is below Relevance Team ($199). Enterprise $499 undercuts CrewAI Standard ($500) and n8n Business ($800). All tiers competitively positioned.

growth_drivers: Vertical AI agents fastest-growing segment (62.7% CAGR)
2_tam_market_data.regional: North America dominates at 39.63% revenue share (2025)
2_tam_market_data.our_opportunity: Mac-native AI agent platforms with visual UI = underserved niche. Even 0.01% of $50B TAM = $5M ARR opportunity.

pitch_talking_points: AI startups command 42% valuation premium — we qualify
Seed rounds for AI average $4.6M — target $3-5M raise
53% of all VC goes to AI — investor appetite is peak
Seed deal count down 29% YoY but valuations up 19% — quality wins
No competitor has our visual + native + billing combination

top_pick.name: Screen Studio
top_pick.why: Purpose-built for product demos, 4K 60fps, auto-zoom, beautiful motion — SaaS demo gold standard

4_video_production.demo_video_plan: Record at 1080x1920 (9:16) in MP4 using Screen Studio. Create 60-90s highlight clips for Reels/TikTok. Full demo can be longer for website/YouTube.

netlify.features: Continuous deploy, instant rollbacks, PR previews, serverless functions

steps: 2. Add New Project > Import Git Repository

vercel.features: Auto CI/CD, PR preview deploys, global CDN, edge functions

5_external_hosting.recommendation: Vercel for Next.js/React (best DX). Netlify for static + forms. GitHub Pages for simple landing pages.
